description: AI-driven autonomous experimentation platforms for accelerated materials synthesis. Covers the A-Lab robotic synthesis platform, ML-guided precursor selection, adaptive XRD characterization, Bayesian optimization of synthesis parameters, and closed-loop discovery workflows.
population: Target inorganic materials for experimental synthesis

description: Pack-level umbrella domain for computational materials science contributions in this PAX (Bartel lab).
Sub-domain covering ML-driven inorganic materials discovery, stability prediction, and convex-hull screening (cross-references the ml-materials-discovery PAX).
Sub-domain covering thermodynamic and decomposition stability of perovskite oxides and halides.
Sub-domain covering topological descriptors of crystal structures used as ML features.
Sub-domain covering catalysis applications and energy-related materials (electrocatalysts, hydrogen storage, etc.).
Sub-domain covering battery cathode/anode/electrolyte material design and screening.
Sub-domain covering thermodynamic models of synthesizability and reaction-route prediction.
